description: Initial proposal document outlining the change
instruction:
Create the proposal document that establishes WHY this change is needed.

Sections:
- **Why**: 1-2 sentences on the problem or opportunity. What problem does this solve? Why now?
- **What Changes**: Bullet list of changes. Be specific about new capabilities, modifications, or removals. Mark breaking changes with **BREAKING**.
- **Capabilities**: Identify which specs will be created or modified:
  - **New Capabilities**: List capabilities being introduced. Each becomes a new `specs/<name>/spec.md`. Use kebab-case names (e.g., `user-auth`, `data-export`).
  - **Modified Capabilities**: List existing capabilities whose REQUIREMENTS are changing. Only include if spec-level behavior changes (not just implementation details). Each needs a delta spec file. Check `openspec/specs/` for existing spec names. Leave empty if no requirement changes.
- **Impact**: Affected code, APIs, dependencies, or systems.

IMPORTANT: The Capabilities section is critical. It creates the contract between
proposal and specs phases. Research existing specs before filling this in.
Each capability listed here will need a corresponding spec file.

Keep it concise (1-2 pages). Focus on the "why" not the "how" -
implementation details belong in design.md.

This is the foundation - specs, design, and tasks all build on this.
context: ## Stack tecnolв”њв”‚gica - HTML5, CSS3 e JavaScript puro (sem frameworks ou bibliotecas externas) - Sem ferramentas de build (sem npm, webpack ou bundlers) - Fonte customizada: "Ricky and Morty font" (arquivo .ttf local) ## API - Rick and Morty API REST pв”њв•‘blica: https://rickandmortyapi.com/api/character/ - Comunicaв”њВєв”њГєo via Fetch API nativa do browser - Dados consumidos: id, nome, status, espв”њВ®cie e gв”њВ¬nero do personagem - Imagem do personagem obtida como Blob e exibida via URL.createObjectURL() ## Domв”њВЎnio - Aplicaв”њВєв”њГєo de pв”њГ­gina в”њв•‘nica (SPA sem roteamento) - Sorteia um personagem aleatв”њв”‚rio da API ao clicar no botв”њГєo "Gerar" - Exibe imagem e informaв”њВєв”њГЃes do personagem em um grid ## Animaв”њВєв”њГЃes - Usa a Web Animations API (new Animation / KeyframeEffect) - Trв”њВ¬s animaв”њВєв”њГЃes encadeadas: portalAppearing Г”ГҐГ† portalSpinning (loop enquanto aguarda dados) Г”ГҐГ† portalFading - Semв”њГ­foro binв”њГ­rio (readyData) sincroniza o tв”њВ®rmino do fetch com o fim da animaв”њВєв”њГєo ## Cursor personalizado - Cursor em formato de "Portal Gun" implementado via elemento posicionado via JS - Rotaв”њВєв”њГєo polar em torno da imagem do personagem usando Math.atan2 - Suporte a eventos de ponteiro (mouse e touch) com setPointerCapture ## Responsividade - Layout e fontes redimensionados programaticamente nos eventos load e resize - Sem media queries; dimensionamento baseado em offsetHeight/offsetWidth dos elementos ## Convenв”њВєв”њГЃes de cв”њв”‚digo - "use strict" ativado - Nomes de variв”њГ­veis e funв”њВєв”њГЃes em inglв”њВ¬s (camelCase) - Comentв”њГ­rios explicativos em inglв”њВ¬s - Separaв”њВєв”њГєo clara de seв”њВєв”њГЃes: DOM, API, Animaв”њВєв”њГЃes, Redimensionamento, Eventos
rules: Manter propostas objetivas, descrevendo o problema, a soluв”њВєв”њГєo e os nв”њГєo-objetivos
Considerar que nв”њГєo hв”њГ­ etapa de build; mudanв”њВєas devem ser aplicв”њГ­veis diretamente nos arquivos HTML, CSS e JS
template:
## Why

<!-- Explain the motivation for this change. What problem does this solve? Why now? -->

## What Changes

<!-- Describe what will change. Be specific about new capabilities, modifications, or removals. -->

## Capabilities

### New Capabilities
<!-- Capabilities being introduced. Replace <name> with kebab-case identifier (e.g., user-auth, data-export, api-rate-limiting). Each creates specs/<name>/spec.md -->
- `<name>`: <brief description of what this capability covers>

### Modified Capabilities
<!-- Existing capabilities whose REQUIREMENTS are changing (not just implementation).
     Only list here if spec-level behavior changes. Each needs a delta spec file.
     Use existing spec names from openspec/specs/. Leave empty if no requirement changes. -->
- `<existing-name>`: <what requirement is changing>

## Impact

<!-- Affected code, APIs, dependencies, systems -->
